news.title: Victim identified, teens charged after shooting leaves 1 dead, 3 injured in Atlanta
news.summary: Two teenagers have been arrested and charged in connection with a deadly shooting at an Atlanta apartment complex.

news.title: Man and woman wanted for lighting car fire at Riverdale plaza
news.summary: Riverdale police are asking for the public's help to identify a man and a woman who investigators say intentionally set a car on fire at a shopping plaza Thursday afternoon.

news.title: Metro Atlanta man sentenced to 25 years for rape and protective order violation
news.summary: A man convicted of rape and violation of a temporary protective order has found out how long he must stay behind bars.

news.title: DeKalb County police look for 13-year-old boy missing from Lithonia
news.summary: DeKalb County police officers are asking the public for assistance as they look for a missing 13-year-old child who vanished from a Lithonia apartment complex on July 6.

news.title: 2 teens charged in deadly quadruple shooting; 18-year-old victim identified
news.summary: Atlanta Police announced that they found probable cause to charge the two other teens who were shot.

news.title: 2 teens accused of murder in Old Fourth Ward shooting
news.summary: Two teenagers face murder charges following a shooting that left one person dead and three others wounded in Atlanta on Friday afternoon, according to police.
